messages.content:
Eres un experto en el codebase de ProjectSight (Trimble Construction).
El proyecto usa .NET/C# en el backend con ASP.NET MVC/Razor y Angular en el frontend.

Reglas críticas del proyecto (nunca las violes):
- Backend: Nunca uses ORM (Entity Framework, Dapper). Solo IDBHelper con stored procedures por nombre.
- Backend: Toda operación de BD va a través de stored procedures nombrados. Jamás inline SQL.
- Frontend: Nunca uses Angular HttpClient. Usa RxJS ajax() via APIBase / APIFactory.
- Frontend: Usa DestroyRef + subscribeTo() para subscriptions, NO Subscription arrays manuales.
- Frontend: Nunca hardcodees colores hex. Usa variables CSS de Default.css.
- No edites delta_procs.sql directamente; se genera automáticamente desde base_procs.sql.
- Agregar o quitar [UseInAPI] en una propiedad dispara APIClientComponentGenerator al compilar.

Cuando implementes cambios, sigue el patrón exacto del diff que se te proporciona.

# PR #10869: PS-69087 Phase 6: org provisioning FileShare test coverage
**Tipo:** test
**Branch:** `wip/adam/ps-69087-phase6-coverage` → `wip/adam/tfc-prep-non-tc-files`

## Descripción
## Summary

Closes Phase 6 FileShare coverage gaps from PS-69087.

| # | Method | Test class |
|---|--------|------------|
| 63 | `IgnitionSystem.GetFileShares` | `IgnitionSystemTests` |
| 10 | `IgnitionSystem.CopyCustomReportFiles` | `IgnitionSystemTests` (org-from-template) |
| 60 | `ProjectSystem.CopyPhysicalFiles` | `ProjectCopyFilesTests` |
| 48 | `StaticSystem.CreateStaticFileID` | `StaticFileIDTests` |

## Changes

- Extended `Records/Portfolios/IgnitionSystemTests.cs` with GetFileShares and custom-report copy assertions
- Added `Records/Projects/ProjectCopyFilesTests.cs` and `Records/StaticSystem/StaticFileIDTests.cs`
- Updated `coverage-progress.md` and `PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist`

## Test plan

Focused filter: IgnitionSystemTests (GetFileShares + CopyCustomReportFiles), ProjectCopyFilesTests, StaticFileIDTests

## Feedback de reviewers
[COMMENTED por @copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]]: ## Pull request overview

This PR targets PS-69087 Phase 6 by filling remaining FileShare-related test coverage gaps around org provisioning helpers, and updates the supporting tracking artifacts used to manage the epic’s coverage checklist.

**Changes:**
- Added/extended ParallelIntegrationTests to cover `IgnitionSystem.GetFileShares`, `IgnitionSystem.CopyCustomReportFiles`, `ProjectSystem.CopyPhysicalFiles`, and `StaticSystem.CreateStaticFileID`.
- Added Phase 6 entries to the PS-69087 playlist and introduced a Phase checklist tracking document for the non-TC-files branch work.
- Updated test assertions to validate concrete filesystem side effects (file existence/size/pathing) for the newly covered methods.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 5 out of 5 changed files in this pull request and generated 4 comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist | Adds Phase 6 test classes to the curated FileShare-touching playlist (non-browser). |
| docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/coverage-progress.md | Introduces a Phase checklist tracker and Phase 6 status/mapping details. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/StaticSystem/StaticFileIDTests.cs | Adds an integration test asserting `CreateStaticFileID` writes the DB row and copies the pending file into FMS. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Projects/ProjectCopyFilesTests.cs | Adds an integration test validating file seeding into new project FMS/Photos directories and exercising `CopyPhysicalFiles`. |
| Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Portfolios/IgnitionSystemTests.cs | Extends org provisioning tests with coverage/assertions for `GetFileShares` and `CopyCustomReportFiles`. |
</details>
[Comentario en docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist:399 por @Copilot]: The Phase 4 ExternalFileService rules appear to be duplicated: the AmazonS3IntegrationTests/AzureBlobIntegrationTests block already exists earlier (around lines 380–388) and is repeated again here. Please remove the duplicate block to keep the playlist deterministic and easier to maintain.
[Comentario en docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/coverage-progress.md:7 por @Copilot]: This doc references a local, user-specific plan path (`C:\Users\acollin\...`) which won’t exist for other contributors/agents. Consider replacing it with a repo-relative path or a link/instructions on where to find the plan artifact so the tracker remains portable.
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/StaticSystem/StaticFileIDTests.cs:19 por @Copilot]: CustomTestCleanupAsync deletes the created DMSFiles/FileVersions rows, but StaticSystem caches the static file id per-organization in a private static dictionary. After this test runs, the cache can still point at a now-deleted FileID, which can break later calls to GetStaticFileID/GetOrCreateStaticFileID in the same test process (stale cache). To avoid cross-test flakiness, consider isolating this test in a throwaway organization/project, or avoid deleting the row (or clear the StaticSystem cache for the org as part of cleanup).
[Comentario en Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Projects/ProjectCopyFilesTests.cs:88 por @Copilot]: The test asserts photo seed files already exist in the new project (lines 69–73), then later calls ProjectSystem.CopyPhysicalFiles (line 87). In ProjectSystem.CopyPhysicalFiles the photo copy uses File.Copy without overwrite (Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/ProjectSystem.cs:1066-1070), so re-invoking it when photos already exist will throw/log an error and short-circuit the photo-copy portion. Consider deleting the destination photo files before the direct invocation (similar to the DMS delete) or otherwise isolating the direct-call validation so the test both stays noise-free and actually validates the photo-copy path.

## Código ANTES del cambio

diff --git a/Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Portfolios/IgnitionSystemTests.cs b/Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Portfolios/IgnitionSystemTests.cs
index f7132e0d429..f693d01ac9d 100644
--- a/Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Portfolios/IgnitionSystemTests.cs
+++ b/Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Portfolios/IgnitionSystemTests.cs
@@ -1,12 +1,93 @@
 ﻿using GCCM.Common.SystemFramework;
 using ProjectSight.Common.Components;
 using ProjectSight.Common.Components.Ignition;
+using static ProjectSight.Tests.Builders.TestDataBuilder;
 
 namespace ProjectSight.Tests.IntegrationTests.Records.Portfolios
 {
     [TestClass]
     public class IgnitionSystemTests : TestBase
     {
+        #region GetFileShares
+
+        [TestMethod]
+        public void GetFileSharesReturnsConfiguredFileShareList()
+        {
+            var fileShares = new IgnitionSystem().GetFileShares();
+
+            fileShares.Should().NotBeNull();
+            fileShares.Should().NotBeEmpty("at least one file share row must be configured");
+
+            var extract = new IgnitionSystem().GetPortfolioExtract(m_oPortfolioId);
+            extract.Should().NotBeNull();
+            extract.FileShare.Should().NotBeNullOrEmpty();
+
+            using (new AssertionScope())
+            {
+                fileShares.Should().Contain(extract.FileShare, "current portfolio's file share must be returned");
+                fileShares.Should().OnlyContain(s => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(s), "file share rows must not be empty");
+            }
+        }
+
+        #endregion // GetFileShares
+
+        #region CopyCustomReportFiles
+
+        [TestMethod]
+        public async Task CreateOrganizationFromTemplateCopiesCustomReportFilesToNewOrganization()
+        {
+            var sourceReportId = await CreateCustomReportAsync(PrologTable.Types.RFI, TestFiles.REPORT_RFI_SUCCESS);
+
+            var sourceExtract = new IgnitionSystem().GetPortfolioExtract(m_oPortfolioId);
+            var sourceReportGuid = ReadReportGuid(m_oPortfolioId, sourceReportId);
+            sourceReportGuid.Should().NotBe(Guid.Empty, "source custom report must have a GUID");
+
+            var sourceReportFile = Path.Combine(sourceExtract.UserReportsDirectory, $"{sourceReportGuid}{Support.RPT_EXTENSION}");
+            File.Exists(sourceReportFile).Should().BeTrue("custom report file must have been staged in source UserReportsDirectory");
+
+            var createRequest = new CreateOrganizationRequest
+            {
+                Name = $"CopyCustomReportFiles {Generate.String(10)}",
+                AccountID = m_Account.AccountID,
+                CreateSampleProject = false,
+                TemplateOrganizationID = m_oPortfolioId,
+                CopyOrganizationSettings = true
+            };
+
+            try
+            {
+                await CreateOrganizationAsync(createRequest);
+
+                var destExtract = new IgnitionSystem().GetPortfolioExtract(m_NewPortfolioId);
+                destExtract.Should().NotBeNull();
+
+                var destReportGuid = ReadReportGuid(m_NewPortfolioId, sourceReportId);
+                destReportGuid.Should().NotBe(Guid.Empty, "copied report row must exist in new organization");
+
+                var destReportFile = Path.Combine(destExtract.UserReportsDirectory, $"{destReportGuid}{Support.RPT_EXTENSION}");
+
+                using (new AssertionScope())
+                {
+                    File.Exists(destReportFile).Should().BeTrue("CopyCustomReportFiles must produce a .rpt at destination GUID path");
+                    new FileInfo(destReportFile).Length.Should().Be(new FileInfo(sourceReportFile).Length, "copied report file size must match source");
+                }
+            }
+            finally
+            {
+                RemoveNewOrganization();
+            }
+        }
+
+        private

[... truncado 32286 chars ...]
